description: The world's laziest Pokémon. When it is lounging, it is actually saving energy for striking back.

abilities.name: Unobservant
abilities.effect: If your opponent’s Active Pokémon is a Basic Pokémon, this Pokémon can’t attack.

attacks.name: Crushing Blow
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Swablu
description: It can't relax if it or its surroundings are not clean. It wipes of dirt with its wings.

attacks.name: Sing
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Swablu
description: It can't relax if it or its surroundings are not clean. It wipes of dirt with its wings.

name: Bidoof
description: A comparison revealed that Bidoof's front teeth grow at the same rate as Rattata's.

attacks.name: Bang Heads
attacks.effect: Both this Pokémon and the Defending Pokémon are now Confused.

name: Bibarel
description: A river dammed by Bibarel will never overflow its banks, which is appreciated by the people nearby.

attacks.name: Amnesia
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Tumbling Tackle
attacks.effect: Both this Pokémon and the Defending Pokémon are now Asleep.

name: Audino
description: Its auditory sense is astounding. It has radarlike ability to understand its surroundings through slight sounds.

attacks.name: Wake-up Beam
attacks.effect: Remove all Special Conditions from the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Drain Slap
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Minccino
description: They great one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

name: Bouffalant
description: They charge wildly and headbutt everything. Their headbutts have enough destructive force to derail a trail.

abilities.name: Bouffer
abilities.effect: Any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Gold Breaker
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is a Pokémon-EX, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Rufflet
description: They crush berries with their talons. They bravely stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong it is.

attacks.name: Chirp
attacks.effect: Search your deck for 2 Pokémon with Fighting Resistance, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Sharp Beak
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Braviary
description: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

name: Devolution Spray
effect: Devolve 1 of your evolved Pokémon and put the highest stage Evolution card on it into your hand. (That Pokémon can’t evolve this turn.)

name: Giant Cape
effect: The Pokémon this card is attached to gets +20 HP.

name: Rescue Scarf
effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from an attack, put that Pokémon into your hand. (Discard all cards attached to that Pokémon.)

name: Tool Scrapper
effect: Choose up to 2 Pokémon Tool cards attached to Pokémon in play (yours or your opponent’s) and discard them.

name: Blend Energy Grass Fire Psychic Darkness
effect: This card provides Colorless Energy. When this card is attached to a Pokémon, this card provides Grass, Fire, Psychic, or Darkness Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time.

name: Blend Energy Water Lightning Fighting Metal
effect: This card provides Colorless Energy. When this card is attached to a Pokémon, this card provides Water, Lightning, Fighting, or Metal Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time.

abilities.name: Rebirth
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is in your discard pile, you may flip a coin. If heads, put this Pokémon onto your Bench and attach 3 different types of basic Energy cards from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rainbow Burn
attacks.effect: Does 20 more damage for each different type of basic Energy attached to this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Versatile
abilities.effect: This Pokémon can use the attacks of any Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent’s). (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

attacks.name: Replace
attacks.effect: Move as many Energy attached to your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Rock Tumble
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Pump-up Smash
attacks.effect: Attach 2 basic Energy cards from your hand to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Triple Laser
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 3 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Protect Charge
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Celestial Roar
attacks.effect: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck. If any of those cards are Energy cards, attach them to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dragon Burst
attacks.effect: Discard all basic Fire Energy or all basic Lightning Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 60 damage times the number of Energy cards you discarded.

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck.

name: Serperior
description: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

abilities.name: Royal Heal
abilities.effect: At any time between turns, heal 10 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Leaf Tornado
attacks.effect: Move as many Grass Energy attached to your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like.

name: Reuniclus
description: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

abilities.name: Damage Swap
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move 1 damage counter from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psywave
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Krookodile
description: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

attacks.name: Dark Clamp
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Bombast
attacks.effect: Does 40 damage times the number of Prize cards you have taken.

name: Rayquaza
description: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on the Defending Pokémon.
